'''Tirsa''' was an industrial [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Tirsa system/Legends|Tirsa system]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. It was home to the [[Tirsa Wargear]] armaments company that manufactured the [[Leviathan Submersible Carrier|Leviathan submersible carrier.]]

==History==
During the [[Galactic War]], the local wildlife of '''Tirsa''' evolved to rely on the local [[Spice/Legends|spice]] deposits. Their unique biology was examined and the [[Blood/Legends|blood]] samples taken from the animals revealed that the [[Spice/Legends|spice]] had bonded with their [[Blood/Legends|blood]] cells.<ref name="Tirsan Spice" />

{{Planet-stub}}
